memoryArtifacts.headline: Jean Ier de Croÿ
memoryArtifacts.description:
Ses parents étaient Guillaume, seigneur de Croÿ (+1384) et Isabeau de Renty.

Jean I de Croÿ est à la base de l’ascension de sa famille à la cour de Bourgogne. Il fut au service de Philippe le Hardi e …

memoryArtifacts.headline:
GENEALOGIE DE LA MAISON de CROY




On trouve les premières traces de la Maison de CROY au XIIme siècle, en Picardie.
Le Seigneurie de CROŸ fu
Stamboom famillie  van Croy
memoryArtifacts.description:
GENEALOGIE DE LA MAISON de CROY




On trouve les premières traces de la Maison de CROY au XIIme siècle, en Picardie.
Le Seigneurie de CROŸ fut élevée au rang de Duché par le Roi Henri IV en 6/1598, …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Johan I de Croy於1365年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆艾萊恩斯時，他的父親Guillaume de Croy45歲，母親Isabeau de Renty30歲。他於1384年與Marie Marguerite DE CRAON結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1415年10月25日在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿古特享年50歲，埋葬在德國貝也。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johan I de Croy于1365年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆艾萊恩斯时，他的父亲Guillaume de Croy45岁，母亲Isabeau de Renty30岁。他于1384年与Marie Marguerite DE CRAON结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1415年10月25日在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿古特享年50岁，埋葬在德国貝也。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Croy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Orkney): habitational name from any of several places called Croy, for example in Inverness-shire.
Probably also Irish: shortened form of   McCroy  , which is a variant of   McRoy  .

nameMeanings.name: Johan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Older Scottish spelling of Joan , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables.

variants.name: Jöns
meanings: Older Scottish spelling of Joan , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables.

variants.name: Jan
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: Jon
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Johan I de Croy was born in 1365, in Airaines, Somme, Picardie, France, his father, Guillaume de Croy, was 45 and his mother, Isabeau de Renty, was 30. He married Marie Marguerite DE CRAON in 1384. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 25 October 1415, in Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 50, and was buried in Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johan I de Croy est né en 1365, à Airaines, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Guillaume de Croy, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Isabeau de Renty, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Marie Marguerite DE CRAON en 1384. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1415, à Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johan I de Croy 1365 in Airaines, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume de Croy 45 und seine Mutter Isabeau de Renty 30. Er hat 1384 Marie Marguerite DE CRAON geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Oktober 1415 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johan I de Croy è nato il nel 1365 nel Airaines, Somme, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume de Croy, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Isabeau de Renty, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Marie Marguerite DE CRAON nel 1384. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 25 ottobre 1415, nel Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Johan I de Croyが1365年にフランスピカーディソンメエイレアインスで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Croyは45歳，母Isabeau de Rentyは30歳であった。1384年にMarie Marguerite DE CRAONと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年10月25日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスアズインコウルトで50歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johan I de Croy(이)가 1365년 프랑스 피카디 솜 어인스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume de Croy(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabeau de Renty(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1384년 Marie Marguerite DE CRAON(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년 10월 25일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 아지쿠르트에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johan I de Croy nasceu em 1365, em Airaines, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Guillaume de Croy, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Isabeau de Renty, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie Marguerite DE CRAON em 1384. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1415, em Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johan I de Croy родился в 1365 г. в местности эиреаинесь, сомм, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume de Croy было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabeau de Renty, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie Marguerite DE CRAON в 1384 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 25 октября 1415 г. в местности азинкоурт, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johan I de Croy nació en 1365, en Airaines, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Guillaume de Croy, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Isabeau de Renty, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Marie Marguerite DE CRAON en 1384. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 25 de octubre de 1415, en Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Bayern, Alemania.
